name: Oysters Baked with Garlic Pine Nut Butter
recipeInstructions:
1. Scatter pine nuts in a pie plate and bake at 350°F (175°C) until golden, about 4-6 minutes.
2. Pour the toasted nuts into a food processor along with the garlic, shallots, parsley, chives, lemon juice, brandy, and black pepper. Pulse until finely chopped. Slowly add the butter and pulse until just blended; bits of all ingredients should still be visible.
3. Shuck oysters and discard the top shells.
4. Nestle the oysters in their bottom shells in a layer of rock salt in a baking pan or shallow oven-proof dish, about 1/2 inch deep.
5. Spoon about 1 teaspoon butter on top of each oyster (freeze leftover butter).
6. Bake at 375°F (190°C) until the oysters become firm and the butter melts, about 8-10 minutes.
